name: Arousero Orb
descrip: Erotic magic that arouses your target.
outcome: [AttackerName] uses the Arousero Orb, making it dissolve into a wave of intense erotic magic that washes over [TargetName], causing [TargetHimOrHer]'s body to shake in pleasure.
miss: [AttackerName] uses the Arousero Orb, making it dissolve into a wave of intense erotic magic that washes over [TargetName], but it seems to have no effect on [TargetHimOrHer].
